abilities.name: Eternal Nightmare
abilities.description: If would reduce to 0 Wounds, may discard card to heal 3 Wounds and gain Reactivate.

abilities.name: Rotten Contents
abilities.description: When suffering Critical Effect or killed, Living within p2 must pass TN 12 Carouse or gain Poison +2.

actions: (1) Hook Hands (Melee) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage.
(1) Gamble Your Life (Gambling) | AV: 5m (11m) | TN: 10M | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. If resist, character suffers 3/4/6. No Cheat, ignore +/-. Once per turn.
(1) The Mist (Enchanting) | AV: 5C (11C) | TN: 10C | Until start of next turn, area within a4 is Ht 3 soft cover.
system.notes: Bad dreams stepped into reality. Burlap puppets filled with rotten meat and offal. Torment living. Force victims to wager body parts. Create new Stitched Together from bodies.
